title: Cockpitdecks Configuration Schema
description: Schema for Cockpitdecks environment, deck, and page configurations.

anyOf.description: Sequence of commands with optional delay/condition

activation.description: Activation type. Known core values: begin-end-command, cockpit, deck, encoder, encoder-mode, encoder-push, encoder-toggle, encoder-value, encoder-value-extended, inspect, mosaic, none, obs, page, page-cycle, push, reload, short-or-long-press, simulator, slider, stop, sweep, swipe, theme. Extensions may add more.

representation.description: Representation type. Known core values: annunciator, annunciator-animate, chart, circular-switch, compass, data, decor, draw-animation, draw-base, ftg, gauge, hardware-icon, icon, icon-animation, icon-base-do-not-use, icon-color, knob, led, mosaic, multi-buttons, multi-icons, multi-texts, push-switch, solari, station-fancy-base, station-plot-base, switch, switch-base, tape, text, textpage, virtual-encoder, virtual-led, weather-icon-base. Extensions may add more.

commands.description: Named commands for this button's activation events

positions.description: Ordered list of commands for sweep/positional activation

includes.description: List of page filenames to include (relative paths without .yaml)
